title: Profile
description: Loaded profile representation passed to the engine. This is the in-memory form after filesystem loading — not the raw filesystem layout (see behavior/profile-loading.md for the directory structure).

name.description: Profile name, matching the directory name used to load it.

identity.description: Content of PROFILE.md. May be empty string if the file is absent (non-default profiles only).

rules.description: Content of RULES.md. Empty string if absent.

custom.description: Content of CUSTOM.md. Empty string if absent.

memories.description: Contents of memory files from the memories/ subdirectory. Files are loaded in ascending lexicographic order by filename. Only .md and .txt files are included. Empty array if the directory is absent.

meta.description: Parsed content of profile.toml. Reserved for future use — the engine does not consume this field. Empty object if profile.toml is absent.
